source_meta.source_document: C-STEM AMT and PINNACLE Acetabular Cup System

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official C-STEM and PINNACLE materials support dedicated femoral and acetabular instrumentation for the combined platform.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official materials describe C-STEM AMT as a polished triple-tapered cemented femoral stem with standard and high-offset options.
Official product materials describe PINNACLE as the acetabular shell family paired with C-STEM in hybrid THR.
Official product materials describe the Pinnacle liner family used in the acetabular construct.
Official C-STEM materials state the stem can be used with both metal and ceramic heads.

row.system_notes: Hybrid or fully cemented total hip arthroplasty construct combining the C-STEM AMT cemented femoral stem with the PINNACLE acetabular cup system.
